- -------- Original Message --------
Subject: 	Re: www/153319: The database update of the Packages is in date
of 2010-12-14 06:46:46 UTC
Date: 	Wed, 22 Dec 2010 05:57:28 +0100
From: 	Eric Douzet <eric.douzet@gmail.com>
To: 	jkois@freebsd.org



Hello,

It's very simple, for description of the Packages in my Server install
list from my Web site.

Sample:

http://www.c-extra.com/en/freebsd-server8.php
http://www.c-extra.com/fr/serveur-freebsd8.php

Click on the link in the Section column, for line number two :

apache-2.2.17_1 The result of the link is Www
<http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/ports.cgi?query=%5Eapache-2.2.17_1&stype=all&sektion=all>

Either:

http://www.c-extra.com/en/freebsd-8en.php#9
http://www.c-extra.com/fr/freebsd-8fr.php#9

I think that you fast go to understand... :-))

Very cordially,

Éric Douzet

Systèmes : FreeBSD, Linux, Mac OSX, Unix et Windows
